basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has officially announced the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 17 June 2026 at Mizoram PSC Official Website. Candidates who are aged between 18 to 35 years and hold a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university along with Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency as per rules are eligible to apply online from 17 June 2026 to 24-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years in case of ST/SC candidates or as may be notified by the Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree from a recognised University, Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' and 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023, Mizo Language Proficiency
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree from a recognised University Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group 'A', 'B' and 'C' posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023 Mizo Language Proficiency

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) recruitment is 24-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Junior Accounts Officer post is 18 years. Applicants must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Accounts Officer post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree from a recognised University, along with Computer Proficiency and Mizo Language Proficiency as per the prescribed rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) post in this recruitment drive by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The Junior Accounts Officer post is offered a salary at Level - 7 in the Pay Matrix, providing a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Accounts Officer post will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for PwBD candidates for this recruitment. They are exempted from paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for this recruitment can be found on the official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission. A direct link is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
